subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename MCP tools file and tool identifiers from Pulse to Tasks
description:
Rename the MCP tools file for the Claude Code runtime and update all tool names and descriptions.

## File Rename

Rename `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-tools/pulse-tools.ts` to `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-tools/task-tools.ts`.

## Tool Name Renames

Update all MCP tool definitions inside the file. The tool names exposed to agents change:

| Current Tool Name | New Tool Name |
|---|---|
| `pulse_list_schedules` (or similar) | `tasks_list` |
| `pulse_create_schedule` | `tasks_create` |
| `pulse_update_schedule` | `tasks_update` |
| `pulse_delete_schedule` | `tasks_delete` |
| `pulse_trigger_schedule` | `tasks_trigger` |
| `pulse_list_runs` | `tasks_list_runs` |
| `pulse_get_run` | `tasks_get_run` |
| `pulse_cancel_run` | `tasks_cancel_run` |

Update all tool descriptions to say "task" instead of "schedule" or "pulse schedule".

## Update imports

Update the import in whichever file registers MCP tools (likely `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-server.ts` or similar) to import from `./mcp-tools/task-tools.js` instead of `./mcp-tools/pulse-tools.js`.

## Update config schema reference

In `packages/shared/src/config-schema.ts`, the MCP tools config has `pulseTools: z.boolean().default(true)`. Rename to `taskTools: z.boolean().default(true)`. Update the default object to include `taskTools` instead of `pulseTools`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pulse-tools.ts` no longer exists
- `task-tools.ts` exists with all renamed tool identifiers
- Tool descriptions reference "task" not "schedule" or "pulse"
- Config schema updated from `pulseTools` to `taskTools`
- All imports updated
activeForm: Renaming MCP tools file and identifiers from Pulse to Tasks
